_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Classic GET /api/types returns a bare list of {type, display_name, pack, initial_state}. Loom wraps the same projection in ListResponse[TypeSummaryLoom] with has_more always false.

shape_decl.rationale: TypeSummaryLoom mirrors classic /api/types item shape; 'type' is the entity's logical primary key but already string-named, no rename.

examples.name: default_types
examples.note: Default packs register several types; fixture pins envelope shape only.
